net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.views

Class CabinViewPart

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.core.commands.common.EventManager
      • org.eclipse.ui.part.WorkbenchPart
        • org.eclipse.ui.part.ViewPart
          • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.views.CabinViewPart
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IExecutableExtension, org.eclipse.ui.IPersistable, org.eclipse.ui.IViewPart, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart2, org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart3, org.eclipse.ui.part.IWorkbenchPartOrientation

    public class CabinViewPart
extends org.eclipse.ui.part.ViewPart
    This class represents the cabin view. All graphics generation is done here.
    Author:
    marc.engelmann, raoul.rothfeld

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.eclipse.ui.IWorkbenchPart

        PROP_TITLE

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clearCache()
      This method disposes all SWT objects created with SWTResourceManager.
      void createPartControl(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      This method initializes all necessary parameters and images.
      Cabin getCabin() 
      static java.lang.String getFilePath()
      This method returns the defined file path.
      boolean isInitialBoot()
      This method returns, if the image is generated for the first time or not.
      static void makeDirectory()
      This method creates a new directors if it does not exist yet.
      void printObstacleMap(org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image obstacleImage)
      This method draws the obstacle map image to the canvas.
      void setCabin(Cabin cabin)
      This method catches a cabin.
      void setFocus()
      Passing the focus request to the viewer's control.
      void submitAgents(java.util.ArrayList<Agent> agentList)
      This method gets the paths.
      org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image submitObstacleMap(int[][] map)
      This method catches an obstacle map and generates an image from it.
      void submitPassengerCoordinates(Cabin paxCabin)
      This method generates the passenger circles.
      void syncViewer()
      This method synchronizes the cabin view with the cabin object by listening to its change events.
      void unsyncViewer()
      This method unsyncs the Cabin view with the cabin object by removing the event listener form the cabin object.

        This method returns the defined file path.

        This method creates a new directors if it does not exist yet.

      • isInitialBoot

        public boolean isInitialBoot()
        This method returns, if the image is generated for the first time or not.
        Returns:
        true or false

      • setCabin

        public void setCabin(Cabin cabin)
        This method catches a cabin.
        Parameters:
        cabin - is the caught cabin

      • syncViewer

        public void syncViewer()
        This method synchronizes the cabin view with the cabin object by listening to its change events.

      • unsyncViewer

        public void unsyncViewer()
        This method unsyncs the Cabin view with the cabin object by removing the event listener form the cabin object.

      • submitObstacleMap

        public org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image submitObstacleMap(int[][] map)
        This method catches an obstacle map and generates an image from it.
        Parameters:
        map - is the obstacle map
        Returns:
        returns the obstacle map as an image

      • submitAgents

        public void submitAgents(java.util.ArrayList<Agent> agentList)
        This method gets the paths.
        Parameters:
        pathList - the list of paths

      • submitPassengerCoordinates

        public void submitPassengerCoordinates(Cabin paxCabin)
        This method generates the passenger circles.
        Parameters:
        paxCabin - the cabin object

      • printObstacleMap

        public void printObstacleMap(org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image obstacleImage)
        This method draws the obstacle map image to the canvas.
        Parameters:
        obstacleImage - the obstacle map image
